# TG Master Journal

> Professional trading journal and analytics workspace for serious traders — log trades, review setups, plan sessions, and analyze your edge.

TG Master Journal is a web application for discretionary forex and futures traders. It combines a trade journal, planning tools, analytics, behavioral insights, and AI-driven coaching into a single workspace.

## Pages

- [Dashboard](/): Overview of trading performance, equity curve, and recent trades.
- [Trades](/trades): Logged trades with grades, RR, screenshots, and execution notes.
- [Analytics](/analytics): Performance analytics by pair, session, weekday, grade, and setup.
- [Macro Intelligence](/macro-intelligence): Institutional macro decision terminal for Fed, USD, and gold bias.
- [Weekly Plans](/weekly-plan): Plan the trading week — bias, levels, and scenarios.
- [Daily Plans](/daily-plan): Pre-session daily plan and rules.
- [Notebook](/notebook): Research notes, charts, and links.
- [Weekly Review](/weekly-review): Performance and behavioral review of the trading week.
- [Setup Playbook](/setup-playbook): Documented trading setups with rules and examples.
- [Psychology](/psychology): Track emotional state and discipline.
- [Mistakes](/mistakes): Catalog of recurring execution mistakes.
- [Behavior Patterns](/behavior-patterns): Detection of overtrading, FOMO, and revenge trading.
- [Trade Quality](/trade-quality): Execution quality by grade and confluence.
- [Bias Analytics](/bias-analytics): Accuracy of daily and weekly directional biases.
- [AI Insights](/ai-insights): AI-driven behavioral insights and risk alerts.
- [Trading Rules](/trading-rules): Codified trading rules and risk limits.
- [Research Lab](/research-lab): Backtesting and chart replay separate from live trades.
- [Calendar](/calendar): Calendar view of trades and plans.
- [Accounts](/accounts): Funded and prop account tracking.
- [System Analytics](/system-analytics): System-level RR and drawdown analytics.
- [Control Center](/control-center): Manage sessions, tags, and grades.

## Optional

- [Settings](/settings): Workspace preferences and account settings.
- [Sign in](/login): Account sign-in page.
